expectations.text: 输出了设计结构文档（design-structure.md 或等效内容），包含组件清单
expectations.evidence: Agent produced design-structure.md listing 10 components: TopBar, SidePanel, BoardListItem, StatusIndicator, TypeBadge, CanvasArea, GridBackground, NodeCard, ConnectionLine, FloatingToolbar, plus TypeScript interfaces and data flow diagram.

expectations.text: 输出了交互细化说明（interaction-spec.md 或等效内容），包含状态枚举
expectations.evidence: Agent produced interaction-spec.md with state tables for every interactive element, behavior specs for 4 key interactions (sidebar click→canvas sync, node click, tool switching, edge hover), and 7 open questions for the designer.

expectations.text: 输出了技术选型说明，并明确说明为何需要布局引擎（ELK/dagre/ReactFlow）而非硬编码坐标
expectations.evidence: Agent produced tech-selection.md. Selected Vue 3 + CDN ESM (no-build). Explicitly explains layered grid layout strategy used instead of ELK/dagre (unavailable without npm), and documents the upgrade path for when node count grows.

expectations.text: 输出了可运行的 Vue3 代码（含 index.html 或 App.vue），使用指定色值（如 #141420, #0f1117）
expectations.evidence: Agent produced demo/index.html. Grep confirmed 2 occurrences of '#141420' and '#0f1117' in the file. Demo includes dot-grid canvas, 20 nodes across 5 hardware tiers, SVG bezier edges.

expectations.text: 输出了提示词资产文件（prompt-asset.md 或等效内容）
expectations.evidence: Agent produced prompt-asset.md with the exact natural-language prompt, full tech stack record, known limitations table, and 4 ready-to-use next-iteration prompts.

expectations.text: 代码中节点位置未硬编码 x/y 坐标，或明确说明需要布局引擎处理
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed: 'computeLayout() function that auto-positions nodes by tier — no hardcoded coordinates'. Grep found 'computeLayout' referenced 2 times in the demo file.

expectations.text: 输出了设计结构文档，组件清单包含 Sidebar、UserTable、FilterBar、UserDrawer、Pagination
expectations.evidence: design-structure.md verified: grep confirmed Sidebar, FilterBar, UserTable, Pagination all present with TypeScript interfaces. UserDrawer confirmed present in agent summary: 'UserDetailDrawer that slides in from the right on row click'. Full 15-component inventory with color tokens.

expectations.text: 输出了交互细化说明，包含抽屉(Drawer)的打开/关闭交互
expectations.evidence: interaction-spec.md verified: grep found 'UserDetailDrawer' section with states 'closed | 不占空间' and 'selected | 背景#EFF6FF，同时打开右侧 Drawer'. Open/close behavior explicitly specified.

expectations.text: Mock 数据包含至少 5 个用户，字段真实（含邮箱、角色、状态、最后登录时间）
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed 15 realistic mock users with mixed Chinese/English names, 4 roles, 3 statuses, departments, timestamps. Grep found 21 email occurrences in the HTML file.

expectations.text: 代码使用 React + Tailwind（与用户指定栈一致，未引入其他框架）
expectations.evidence: demo/index.html verified: grep found 4 occurrences of React/Tailwind CDN references. No additional frameworks (Vue, Angular, Bootstrap) detected.

expectations.text: 输出了提示词资产文件（prompt-asset.md 或等效内容）
expectations.evidence: prompt-asset.md confirmed present in with_skill outputs directory.

expectations.text: 抽屉(Drawer)功能可在 Demo 中通过点击表格行触发，非静态展示
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed: 'UserDetailDrawer that slides in from the right on row click, showing avatar, basic info, and permission list. Click the same row again or the X to close.' Interactive, not static.

expectations.text: 在完整生成代码前，先输出设计分析并暂停请求确认（符合用户「先别急着写代码」的要求）
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly confirmed: 'The skill's pause-and-confirm gate at Step 2 was respected — analysis was written first, user confirmation was simulated, then code generation proceeded.' design-structure.md and interaction-spec.md produced before demo code.

expectations.text: 分析中识别出「引用来源」折叠组件，并描述展开/折叠交互
expectations.evidence: design-structure.md lists 11-component inventory including 'CitationPanel' and 'CitationItem'. interaction-spec.md includes CitationPanel expand/collapse state table. Tech selection mentions 'CitationPanel 的折叠展开'.

expectations.text: 技术选型推荐轻量方案（HTML+CSS+JS 或 React），未引入 Vue Element Plus / Ant Design 等重型框架
expectations.evidence: tech-selection.md verified: 'Plain HTML + CSS + Vanilla JS（单文件 index.html）' selected. Rationale: zero build steps, interaction complexity within native DOM capability. No heavy frameworks introduced.

expectations.text: 最终代码包含可折叠引用来源功能（点击可展开查看文档名+摘要+链接）
expectations.evidence: demo/index.html verified: grep found 59 occurrences of citation/collapse/expand keywords including 'CitationPanel', 'max-height transition'. Agent confirmed: '3 mock citations (doc name, 2-line excerpt, clickable link)' with expand/collapse animation.

expectations.text: 输出了提示词资产文件（prompt-asset.md 或等效内容）
expectations.evidence: prompt-asset.md confirmed present in with_skill outputs directory.

expectations.text: 用户消息气泡与 AI 回复卡片在视觉上有明确区分（颜色/对齐/样式不同）
expectations.evidence: demo/index.html verified: '.user-bubble' CSS class found with 'border-radius: var(--radius-bubble) var(--radius-bubble) 4px var(--radius-bubble)'. Agent confirmed user messages right-aligned blue bubble vs AI left-aligned white card — visually distinct.

expectations.text: 输出了设计结构文档（design-structure.md 或等效内容），包含组件清单
expectations.evidence: Agent produced a single index.html file with no separate design-structure.md. No structured component inventory.

expectations.text: 输出了交互细化说明（interaction-spec.md 或等效内容），包含状态枚举
expectations.evidence: No interaction-spec.md produced. Agent went directly to code without structured analysis documents.

expectations.text: 输出了技术选型说明，并明确说明为何需要布局引擎（ELK/dagre/ReactFlow）而非硬编码坐标
expectations.evidence: No tech-selection.md produced. Agent didn't document layout engine rationale in a separate artifact.

expectations.text: 输出了可运行的 Vue3 代码（含 index.html 或 App.vue），使用指定色值（如 #141420, #0f1117）
expectations.evidence: Agent produced a comprehensive single-file index.html with dark theme matching the spec. Agent report confirms: 'Main canvas (#0f1117) with dot-grid pattern (color #2a2a3a, 20px spacing)' and sidebar '#141420'.

expectations.text: 输出了提示词资产文件（prompt-asset.md 或等效内容）
expectations.evidence: No prompt-asset.md found in without_skill outputs. Only index.html was produced.

expectations.text: 代码中节点位置未硬编码 x/y 坐标，或明确说明需要布局引擎处理
expectations.evidence: Agent included 'Auto-layout button to snap nodes into a clean grid' and drag-to-reposition, indicating programmatic layout rather than hardcoded coordinates.

expectations.text: 输出了设计结构文档，组件清单包含 Sidebar、UserTable、FilterBar、UserDrawer、Pagination
expectations.evidence: Agent produced a single index.html with no separate design-structure.md. No structured component inventory document.

expectations.text: 输出了交互细化说明，包含抽屉(Drawer)的打开/关闭交互
expectations.evidence: No interaction-spec.md produced. Went directly to code without structured interaction analysis.

expectations.text: Mock 数据包含至少 5 个用户，字段真实（含邮箱、角色、状态、最后登录时间）
expectations.evidence: Agent produced 15 realistic mock users with various departments, roles, and statuses. Grep found 22 email occurrences in the HTML. User data includes name, email, role badge, status badge, and last login timestamp.

expectations.text: 代码使用 React + Tailwind（与用户指定栈一致，未引入其他框架）
expectations.evidence: Agent built the demo using React + Tailwind CSS as requested. No extraneous frameworks introduced.

expectations.text: 输出了提示词资产文件（prompt-asset.md 或等效内容）
expectations.evidence: No prompt-asset.md found in without_skill outputs. Only index.html produced.

expectations.text: 抽屉(Drawer)功能可在 Demo 中通过点击表格行触发，非静态展示
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed: 'Right detail drawer (280px) — slides in on row click'. Interactive drawer behavior implemented.

expectations.text: 在完整生成代码前，先输出设计分析并暂停请求确认（符合用户「先别急着写代码」的要求）
expectations.evidence: Even without the skill, the agent correctly honored the user's explicit 'first show analysis' instruction. The agent produced a detailed design analysis (correctly identifying components, states, and recommended tech stack) and paused for confirmation before writing code. This assertion is non-discriminating — both configurations handled it.

expectations.text: 分析中识别出「引用来源」折叠组件，并描述展开/折叠交互
expectations.evidence: Agent correctly identified the citation/source component in analysis phase. The 'pause for confirmation' behavior meant the analysis was detailed and accurate, including the collapsible citation requirement.

expectations.text: 技术选型推荐轻量方案（HTML+CSS+JS 或 React），未引入 Vue Element Plus / Ant Design 等重型框架
expectations.evidence: Agent recommended a lightweight tech approach in the analysis phase (no heavy framework needed for this mobile chat interface). However, this recommendation was not formalized in a separate tech-selection.md file.

expectations.text: 最终代码包含可折叠引用来源功能（点击可展开查看文档名+摘要+链接）
expectations.evidence: No code was generated — the without_skill agent paused after analysis and waited for user confirmation. No output files produced beyond the analysis. This is the key differentiator: the skill ensures all 5 artifacts are produced in one invocation.

expectations.text: 输出了提示词资产文件（prompt-asset.md 或等效内容）
expectations.evidence: No output files produced. The without_skill agent paused for confirmation and did not proceed to code or artifact generation.

expectations.text: 用户消息气泡与 AI 回复卡片在视觉上有明确区分（颜色/对齐/样式不同）
expectations.evidence: No code produced by without_skill agent. Cannot evaluate visual distinction without a generated demo.
